customer_anxiety_profile: Low-commitment, exploratory posture. Dominic framed the call as information-gathering at his wife's suggestion, explicitly told Randy not to expect a decision on the closer call. He runs a landscaping business and is in spring rush — schedule is unpredictable, availability is tight. He is not hostile, but he has pre-committed to not deciding, which means the closer needs to re-engage his curiosity before presenting.
unresolved_concerns: Ownership structure (lease vs. own) — Dominic asked directly at 06:48 and was correctly deferred to the closer. He will ask again.
Wife not confirmed on the appointment — she initiated the inquiry and is on the title, but her presence on the closer call was never established.
16-year-old roof — Randy noted it and moved on without probing for replacement plans. The closer should assess whether this is a barrier or a cross-sell opportunity.
sensitive_topics_raised: Unpredictable schedule due to spring landscaping season — Dominic flagged 14-hour days and inability to commit to a time window. Phone-only format was agreed to address this.
Explicit low-commitment framing — Dominic said directly: 'We're just kind of exploring options right now. Like, we're not committed.'
exact_promises_rep_made: Appointment booked for tomorrow (next day from call) at 4PM by phone.
Confirmation text will be sent once the utility bill is received — bill not yet in hand at time of booking.
One hour blocked for the appointment so Dominic does not feel rushed.
Text already sent with bill submission instructions.
closer_should_know: The wife initiated this inquiry and is on the title but is NOT confirmed on the call — she is the primary decision-maker and her absence is the top no-show and no-close risk. Re-confirm her presence at the top of the closer call before presenting anything. Secondary: Dominic has pre-committed to 'just exploring,' so the closer needs to re-anchor to the bill (opened the morning of the setter call, approximately $242, Duke Energy, approximately 1,200 kWh/month) before moving to the design — the bill is the only emotional hook established on this call.
